description: Pickle DaaS buyer segments — maps data fields to buyer types, use cases, and pricing

segments.name: Equipment & Paddle Brands
use_cases: Measure on-court brand visibility ROI across venues
Identify sponsorship whitespace (brands NOT appearing on camera)
Track competitor brand presence per venue/region
Optimize paddle placement and endorsement spend
Target high-skill players for ambassador programs
segments.pitch_angle: Your brand appears in X clips for Y seconds. Your competitor appears in Z. Here's what that means for your sponsorship ROI.
segments.notes: JOOLA detected in 47+ clips. Selkirk at zero. That gap IS the pitch.

segments.name: Coaching Platforms & Player Rating Systems
use_cases: Enrich DUPR ratings with 'why' data (shot intelligence, not just W/L)
Auto-generate personalized coaching reports per player
Track player skill progression across sessions
Benchmark players against skill-level cohorts
Feed training recommendation engines
segments.product_format: Player Enrichment API (JSON) + Player DNA Profiles
segments.pitch_angle: DUPR knows WHO is good. We know WHY. Together = the only complete player profile in pickleball.
segments.notes: 12 players profiled with full DNA. Need full corpus run for 50+ player depth.

segments.name: Media & Content Platforms
use_cases: Auto-curate viral highlight reels from raw footage
Generate broadcast-ready AI commentary (4 voice personas)
Score clips for social media virality before posting
Feed content recommendation algorithms
License pre-captioned clips for TikTok/Reels/Shorts
segments.product_format: Content API + Highlight Feed + Voice Commentary MP3s
segments.pitch_angle: 645% YoY growth in pickleball content on TikTok. We auto-generate broadcast-ready highlights with commentary. You just publish.
segments.notes: 32+ MP3 voice commentaries already generated. 4 voice personas per clip.

segments.name: Venue Operators (Bundled Upsell)
use_cases: Demonstrate camera ROI to venue owners in sales conversations
Provide member engagement analytics as retention tool
Help venues sell sponsorship space with visibility data
Track which courts/times generate highest-quality content
segments.pitch_angle: Our cameras don't just record highlights. They generate intelligence that helps you retain members and sell sponsorships.
segments.notes: Already in deal flow with 3 venues. DaaS is the 'why our cameras are different' argument.

segments.name: Sports Betting & Daily Fantasy
use_cases: Build predictive models for match outcomes
Power live in-play betting odds adjustments
Create DFS player projections from video intelligence
Detect form changes and injury risk signals
Generate historical performance baselines for line setting
segments.product_format: Performance Data Feed (real-time API) + Historical Archive
segments.pitch_angle: FanDuel already offers pickleball betting in 10 states. They have zero structured player performance data. We have it.
segments.notes: Requires prompt update to extract betting-relevant fields. Zero additional cost per clip.

segments.name: Apparel & Lifestyle Brands
use_cases: Measure on-court apparel brand visibility
Segment player demographics by skill level for targeting
Optimize sponsorship placement by venue demographic match
Track competitor apparel penetration across venues
segments.pitch_angle: Lululemon sponsors Life Time pickleball. We can tell them exactly how many players wear their gear, at what skill level, and where the whitespace is.
segments.notes: Current pipeline detects some apparel. Needs prompt refinement for detailed apparel taxonomy.

segments.name: CPG / Health & Wellness Brands
use_cases: Measure venue-level brand penetration for CPG products
Identify sponsorship opportunities by player demographic
Track Recovery Cave vs competitor visibility at venues
Optimize on-court advertising placement
segments.pitch_angle: Recovery Cave already appears in your clips. Here's exactly how visible they are. Want the same report for your brand?
segments.notes: Recovery Cave detected in 3 clips. LIFE TIME PICKLEBALL in 3 clips. Foundation exists.

segments.name: Sports Data Aggregators & Intelligence Platforms
use_cases: White-label the entire analysis pipeline for their platforms
License structured video-derived statistics at scale
Feed their existing sports data products with pickleball
Power broadcast analytics overlays
segments.pitch_angle: Second Spectrum sold to Genius Sports for $200M+. Statcast is the standard in baseball. Pickleball has 36M players and zero equivalent. We're building it.
segments.notes: Requires enterprise-grade API, SLAs, audit trail. Langfuse + Supabase are prerequisites.

segments.name: Insurance & Healthcare
use_cases: Model injury risk by player demographic and skill level
Build actuarial models for pickleball-related claims
Power preventive health recommendations
Partner with PT clinics on injury prevention programs
segments.pitch_angle: Pickleball injuries cost $377-500M annually. We have the only video-derived biomechanics dataset that can help predict and prevent them.
segments.notes: Requires privacy/compliance work. Massive addressable market once solved.

segments.name: Local Venue Advertisers
use_cases: Self-serve local advertising dashboard per venue
Prove ROI on venue-level sponsorship spend
Target advertising by player demographics and time slots
segments.pitch_angle: 500 pickleball players walk past your ad 3x per week. Here's the proof.
segments.notes: Low per-deal but high volume at scale. Build self-serve after 10+ venues.

segments.name: Real Estate & Hospitality
use_cases: Inform real estate development decisions near courts
Optimize resort/hospitality pickleball programming
Forecast tournament attendance and economic impact
Track venue utilization for investment decisions
segments.pitch_angle: Homes near pickleball courts sell at 10% premium. We have the utilization data to prove which courts drive value.
segments.notes: Strategic play. Requires multi-venue network data.
